creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thanks for your report Mikhail,

I'm unable to reproduce this locally, setting CPUTYPE=<valid-value-for-compiler> is passed correctly to the compile arguments.

Can you please provide the following (as attachments for anything more than a few lines):

* Contents of /etc/make.conf
* uname -a output
* OPTIONS selected for multimedia/x264
* List of installed packages
* Port build invocation command line and build log output

I'm specifically interested in what system/compiler combination you're running.
